author: Haroen Viaene
subject: feat(useInstantSearch): expose status & error (algolia/react-instantsearch#3645)
body: **Summary** Introduces `status` and `error` in the response of `useInstantSearch`, as well as a new option on `useInstantSearch` to indicate errors in the search lifecycle should be caught. built on top of https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/pull/5127 **Result** ```jsx function Status() { const { status, error } = useInstantSearch({ catchError: true }); return ( <> Search status: {status} {error && a search error occurred: {error.message}} ); } ``` FX-1769
